title: Section 110B
content: 1[110B. Signature of documents. --Every document which is required by this Act or by any rule made thereunder to be signed by the 2[Chairperson of the Authority] or by any person subordinate to him or by any officer authorised by him under sub-section (1) of section 42 shall be deemed to be properly signed, if it bears a facsimile of the signature of such 2[Chairperson of the Authority], person or officer printed, engraved, lithographed or impressed by any other mechanical process approved by the Central Government.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 20 of 1940, s. 14 (w.e.f. 10-4-1940). 2. Subs. by Act 41 of 1999, s. 30 and the First Schedule (serial no. 43), for "Controller" (w.e.f. 19-4-2000).
